Venue Info
Media Gallery
Luna Park
Buenos Aires, ARG
Seating Capacity: 8280
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 1
  DMB  (1)

Longest Performance:
10.14.10 - Two Step (17:15)
Venue Picture
Description
Buenos Aires's Luna Park shares the name of the amusement park in which it resides. As a result, it is often referred to as Estadio Luna Park (i.e., Luna Park Stadium). Once the home of international boxing matches, the Luna is the largest indoor stadium in Argentina, hosting some of the biggest shows and concerts in Buenos Aires.
